'''shadoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabbaton|sabbaton]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-d-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabbaton|sabbaton]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shadoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shædereth|shædereth]] || [[word:shæderej|shæderej]] || [[word:shæderesh|shæderesh]] || [[word:shædere|shædere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shadodoroth|shadodoroth]] || [[word:shadodoroj|shadodoroj]] || [[word:shadodorosh|shadodorosh]] || [[word:shadodoro|shadodoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shadoroth|shadoroth]] || [[word:shadoroj|shadoroj]] || [[word:shadorosh|shadorosh]] || [[word:shadoro|shadoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shadofroth|shadofroth]] || [[word:shadofroj|shadofroj]] || [[word:shadofrosh|shadofrosh]] || [[word:shadofrof|shadofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shadorotho|shadorotho]] || [[word:shadorojo|shadorojo]] || [[word:shadorosho|shadorosho]] || [[word:shadoroko|shadoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shadoroth|shadoroth]] || [[word:shadoroj|shadoroj]] || [[word:shadorosh|shadorosh]] || [[word:shadoro|shadoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shadorothol|shadorothol]] || [[word:shadorojol|shadorojol]] || [[word:shadoroshol|shadoroshol]] || [[word:shadorokol|shadorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shadorothotho|shadorothotho]] || [[word:shadorojojo|shadorojojo]] || [[word:shadoroshosho|shadoroshosho]] || [[word:shadoroko|shadoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shadorothon|shadorothon]] || [[word:shadorojon|shadorojon]] || [[word:shadoroshon|shadoroshon]] || [[word:shadorokon|shadorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shadorothoro|shadorothoro]] || [[word:shadorojoro|shadorojoro]] || [[word:shadoroshoro|shadoroshoro]] || [[word:shadorokoro|shadorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
